---
title: "VIN NBV Diagrams"
---

This page contains the architecture diagrams for the VIN NBV system.

## Overall Architecture

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/overall.mmd
```

## Scene Field

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/scene_field.mmd
```

## Pose Encoder

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/pose_encoder.mmd
```

## Global Pool

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/global_pool.mmd
```

## Head

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/head.mmd
```

## Trajectory

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/trajectory.mmd
```

## Semidense Projection

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/semidense_proj.mmd
```

## Semidense Frustum

```{mermaid}
%%| file: ../diagrams/vin_nbv/mermaid/semidense_frustum.mmd
```
